title: LedgerLens Model Metadata
description: Metadata schema for LedgerLens trained model cards (Google Model Card specification).

training_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the model was trained.

dataset_version.description: Version or identifier of the training dataset.

hyperparameters.description: Key/value map of hyperparameter names to their values.

known_limitations.description: Plain-text description of known model limitations.

intended_use.description: Intended use cases for this model.

out_of_scope_uses.description: Use cases explicitly out of scope for this model.

dataset_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 of the training Parquet file, computed at training time.

shap_importance_chart_path.description: Relative path to a SHAP feature importance chart image.

ledgerlens_version.description: LedgerLens codebase version at training time.

regulatory_contact.description: Contact email or URL for regulatory enquiries (valuable for audits).

data_retention_policy.description: Description of how long training data is retained and under what policy.
